task_completion.description: Verify that a new folder named 'Legal_Hold' has been created under 'Local Folders'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Thunderbird folder pane (usually on the left), there should be a folder named 'Legal_Hold' nested under 'Local Folders'.

task_completion.description: Verify that emails containing 'Acme' in the subject line have been moved to the 'Legal_Hold' folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: When the 'Legal_Hold' folder is selected, the message list should display emails with 'Acme' in their subject lines.

task_completion.description: Verify that exactly 4 emails are present in the 'Legal_Hold' folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The message list for the 'Legal_Hold' folder should show exactly 4 emails. No more, no less.

task_completion.description: Verify that all 4 recovered emails are marked as Starred.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the message list of the 'Legal_Hold' folder, the star icon next to each of the 4 emails should be filled/highlighted.

task_completion.description: Verify that all 4 recovered emails are marked as Unread.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the message list of the 'Legal_Hold' folder, the 4 emails should appear unread (typically indicated by bold text, a filled circle/dot, or an unread icon depending on the Thunderbird theme).

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the Thunderbird GUI to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Mozilla Thunderbird application interface being interacted with, rather than terminal windows or scripts.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not mock the results in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The results must be visible within the actual Thunderbird email client, not a text editor or a web browser displaying a fake UI.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not use terminal commands to move or modify the email files directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows open showing commands like 'mv', 'cp', or sqlite3 modifications related to Thunderbird profiles.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target folder must be named 'Legal_Hold' under 'Local Folders'. There must be exactly 4 emails in this folder, all containing the keyword 'Acme' in their subject lines. All 4 emails must be marked as both Starred and Unread.
